name: SpecialToMovie
description: Automatically detects TV specials that are also standalone movies, creates hard links in your movie library, and syncs watch status bidirectionally.
overview: Detects TV specials that are also movies, creates hard links, and syncs watch status.

versions.changelog: Add configurable Primary Metadata Provider (TMDB or TVDB) for conflict resolution. Persist not-found cache to disk across restarts. Batch RemoveForceLinkedPairs writes. Fix NotFoundCache timer race conditions.

New UI features: sortable column headers, Run Cleanup button, auto-refresh pagination, library filter, search debounce. Refactor scan/cleanup to use Jellyfin task scheduler. Batch PairStore writes. Fix FindExistingMovie cross-library matching. Fix CleanupTask ignoring AutoDeleteOnRemoval setting. Fix IUserManager.Users API for Jellyfin 10.11.9.
Cache TMDB/TVDB 404 responses to avoid repeated failed API calls (configurable TTL, default 14 days). Fix Linked Pairs table overflowing the screen on narrow viewports.

Delegate item deletion to Jellyfin instead of manual file operations. Improve two-way deletion UI with clearer warnings. Fix info disclosure in API test endpoints. Add search debounce and movie cache for single-episode processing.
Fix hard link failure on long file paths (Win32 MAX_PATH limit). Rename plugin display name to Special To Movie.
